title: Cover - REKT
relevance_summary: Infinite mint exploit followed by rapid withdrawal and sale of tokens on decentralized exchange

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls mint() immediately followed by withdraw() in the same transaction

red_flags: Multiple accounts exploiting the same vulnerability
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls mint() immediately followed by withdraw() in the same transaction
summary: The Cover protocol was exploited through an infinite mint loophole, allowing attackers to mint and withdraw large amounts of tokens. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for mint followed by withdraw in the same transaction.
